meta.title: The US Will No Longer Ignore the Fundamental Differences between the Two Systems
meta.description:
中美之争是两种政治制度和两种意识形态之争

Hudson Institute China Center presents episode seven of Evening Chats with Mike Pompeo: A Message to the Chinese People. In this series, Seventieth US Secretary of State Michael R. Pompeo speaks directly to the Chinese people about the Chinese Communist Party and US-China relations.  

In this episode, Pompeo urges Americans to see what the Chinese people already see, that we should take the CCP at its word about its Marxist ideology. He explains how the West has failed to see what the Chinese people have experienced for decades, and asks Americans to be confident in their values and their capacity to overcome communism.  

中文原文: https://s3.amazonaws.com/media.hudson.org/Transcript+Chinese+The+US+Will+No+Longer+Ignore+the+Fundamental+Political+and+Ideological+Differences+between+the+Two+Systems.pdf

English transcript: https://s3.amazonaws.com/media.hudson.org/Transcript+English+The+US+Will+No+Longer+Ignore+the+Fundamental+Differences+between+the+Two+Systems.pdf

Learn more about the China Center here: https://www.hudson.org/china-center
